name: @agenticprimitives-demo/gs
description: Global Switchboard (demo-gs): a relying-app prototype for skill-based Need/Offering brokerage. A GCO Organization Agent declares a skill Need, a KC Person Agent publishes an expertise Offering, and the app turns shared skill/geo/cause anchors into an explainable Need → Offering → IntentMatch → Agreement flow (spec 250). Sibling of demo-jp. Demo only — placeholder names; no real-program affiliation.
